topStories.title: 'Not Iran, But US Is In Danger': Ex-US Counter-Terror Chief Questions Trump's War Rhetoric
topStories.description: Joe Kent cautions that aggressive rhetoric on Iran could damage America's credibility and destabilise the global order

topStories.title: Health insurers rise after US lifts 2027 Medicare Advantage payment rates
topStories.description: U.S. health insurer stocks surged after the government announced higher-than-expected Medicare Advantage payment rates for 2027, unlocking over $13 billion in additional payouts. The move eased concerns after weak earlier proposals, with analysts expecting improved margins and renewed investor confidence across the sector amid rising medical costs.

dailyNews.title: Iranians form human chains at bridges and power plants
dailyNews.description: Tehran had urged people to gather outside potential US and Israeli targets after Donald Trump threatened to attack civilian infrastructure.

dailyNews.title: Rapper Lil Tjay arrested in Florida following Offset shooting incident
dailyNews.description: Lil Tjay has been arrested in Florida in connection with a shooting involving Offset. Authorities say the incident began as a fight, while the rapper’s lawyer denies claims linking him directly to the shooting.

dailyNews.title: Iraqi armed group releases abducted US journalist Shelly Kittleson
dailyNews.description: The armed group Kataib Hezbollah said that it would free Kittleson on the condition that she leave Iraq immediately.

dailyNews.title: Tehran synagogue destroyed as US-Israeli strikes kill over a dozen
dailyNews.description: A synagogue in Tehran was struck in a wave of US-Israeli attacks overnight.

dailyNews.title: ‘Use of nuclear weapons can never be justified’: Rahul Gandhi on Trump's ‘civilization will die’ threat to Iran
dailyNews.description: “Any language or action that contemplates the end of civilisation is unacceptable in the modern world,” Gandhi said, referring to Trump's “tonight” claim

dailyNews.title: Trump health rumours explained: Where is Walter Reed hospital and why speculation spiked
dailyNews.description: Unverified claims about US President Donald Trump being admitted to Walter Reed hospital triggered widespread online speculation. Here’s what is known, what isn’t, and how the rumours gained traction.

dailyNews.title: Politicians, celebrities slam Donald Trump over ‘whole civilization will die’ threat to Iran
dailyNews.description: Trump's threat to Iran has sparked backlash from actors, politicians, and the UN Secretary-General, who have issued warnings against genocide and the violation of international law.

dailyNews.title: Social ill cannot be branded as ‘religious practice’, says Supreme Court on maiden day of Sabarimala reference hearing
dailyNews.description: Legislature, not courts, is entitled to enact social reform, the Centre responds; as the Union government argues whether the judges have the expertise to decide on the matter, the court says it is empowered to examine opinions of experts.

dailyNews.title: Bill Gates To Appear Before House Epstein Panel On June 10
dailyNews.description: The New York Times reported in 2019 that Gates met with Epstein several times starting in 2011 and once stayed late at his New York townhouse.

dailyNews.title: Gautam Adani Seeks Dismissal Of Lawsuit By US Markets Regulator, Cites Overreach
dailyNews.description: Adanis argued that the court lacks personal jurisdiction, saying neither had sufficient contacts with US or direct involvement in the bond offering.

dailyNews.title: On Trump's Iran will ‘die’ threat, former US Army officer Lawrence Sellin says ‘military will not obey illegal orders’
dailyNews.description: After US President Donald Trump's fresh threat to Iran, Lawrence Sellin, a retired US Army Reserve colonel, also warned that “the issuance of illegal orders would create a Constitutional crisis.”

dailyNews.title: Tracking recent US-Israeli strikes on Iranian infrastructure
dailyNews.description: Attacks have targeted bridges, steel plants and pharmaceutical facilities, verified videos show.

dailyNews.title: US weather alert: Flood threat looms over South Florida, key cities on watchlist
dailyNews.description: According to AccuWeather, most areas along the Atlantic coast and across South Florida could receive 1–2 inches of rain between Monday and Thursday.

dailyNews.description: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth's soldier-first approach drives Operation Epic Fury in Iran, prioritizing maximum lethality over diplomatic caution.

dailyNews.title: Trump's 'whole civilization will die tonight' Iran threat polarizes social media
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump polarized social media with a Truth Social post that an entire "civilization will die tonight" while threatening a devastating U.S. attack against Iran.

dailyNews.title: Iran's UN ambassador takes swipe at Trump in final hours before Strait of Hormuz deadline
dailyNews.description: Iran's UN ambassador is calling one of President Donald Trump's posts on Truth Social on Tuesday “deeply irresponsible" and “profoundly alarming."

dailyNews.title: Trump’s apocalyptic Iran warning raises stakes for sweeping US strike threat
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump escalates rhetoric against Iran, warning of massive infrastructure strikes as a Tuesday deadline to reopen the Strait of Hormuz approaches.

dailyNews.title: Iranians Voice Shock and Defiance in Face of Trump’s Looming Deadline
dailyNews.description: President Trump has threatened devastating attacks if Iran does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Some Iranians questioned what had happened to American values.

dailyNews.title: Trump Threatens Broad Attacks in Iran. How Is Illegal Conduct in War Defined?
dailyNews.description: It is illegal for any military to target civilians, as President Trump has suggested he would in threats against Iran. But the U.S. has sought significant leeway in defining a civilian target.

dailyNews.title: What to Watch in the Georgia Special Election to Replace Marjorie Taylor Greene
dailyNews.description: Clay Fuller, a Republican allied with President Trump, will face Shawn Harris, a Democrat, in the election to fill the remainder of Ms. Greene’s term after her resignation from Congress.

dailyNews.title: Trump says "whole civilization will die tonight" as Iran deadline looms
dailyNews.description: Iran's regime calls on civilians to shield power plants as Trump threatens "a whole civilization" with destruction if Tehran doesn't reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Vance phones Trump while giving speech in Hungary
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance called President Trump on the phone while delivering remarks Tuesday in Hungary. CBS News intelligence and national security reporter Olivia Gazis has more.

dailyNews.title: 'A whole civilization will die tonight': Trump threatens Iran ahead of ceasefire deadline
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said, "a whole civilization will die tonight" in a post on Truth Social ahead of the deadline for an agreement on a ceasefire in the war with Iran. NBC News’ Matt Bradley reports on the latest out of the Middle East.
